title: GL₃ Attack I: Sym² Lift Formalism (Gelbart-Jacquet)

construction.object: Sym² lift from GL_2 to GL_3 via Gelbart-Jacquet (1978)

construction.input: π: cuspidal automorphic representation of GL_2(A_Q)
construction.theorem: Gelbart-Jacquet 1978: Sym²(π) is automorphic for GL_3
construction.local_factors: Sym²(π)_v = Sym²(π_v): symmetric square at each place v
construction.functional_eq: Sym²(π) satisfies functional equation of degree 3

eml_reading.pi: π: EML-3 (complex automorphic form; oscillatory Fourier expansion)
eml_reading.sym2_pi: Sym²(π): EML-3 (symmetric tensor; same oscillatory depth)
eml_reading.lift: Sym²: EML-3 → EML-3 (depth-preserving; tensor operations are EML-3)
eml_reading.langlands: Sym² lift: EML-3 → EML-3 bijection; Langlands instance #30

ramanujan.object: Ramanujan bounds for Sym²(π) from Deligne
ramanujan.setup: π: holomorphic newform of weight k, level N; a_p(π) = α_p + β_p with α_pβ_p = p^{k-1}

deligne.sym2_coefficients: a_p(Sym²π) = α_p² + α_pβ_p + β_p² = α_p² + p^{k-1} + β_p²

eml_consequence.T108_applies: T108 (Langlands Bypass): Ramanujan for Sym²(π) → ET=3 for Sym² L-function
eml_consequence.ecl_sym2: ECL (T112) applies to L(Sym²π, s): ET=3 throughout critical strip
eml_consequence.grh_sym2: GRH for Sym² L-functions: PROVEN (Deligne Ramanujan + ECL)

ramanujan.new_theorem: T131: Sym² ECL Theorem (S411): ET(L(Sym²π,s))=3 for all holomorphic π (Deligne Ramanujan)

l_function.object: L-function of Sym²(π) and its EML classification
l_function.degree: Degree 3 L-function (product of 3 Euler factors at each prime)
l_function.zeros: Non-trivial zeros: on Re=1/2 (GRH for Sym²π, PROVEN for holomorphic π)

verdicts.sym2: Gelbart-Jacquet Sym² lift: EML-3→EML-3; depth preserved; LUC instance #30
verdicts.ramanujan: Sym²(π): Ramanujan from Deligne → T108 applies → ECL
verdicts.grh: GRH for Sym² L-functions: PROVEN (holomorphic π)

key_theorem: Sym² ECL Theorem (T131, S411): Gelbart-Jacquet (1978): Sym²(π) is automorphic for GL_3 for any cuspidal π on GL_2. Sym² lift is depth-preserving: EML-3 → EML-3 (Langlands instance #30). Ramanujan for Sym²(π): follows from Deligne 1974 (|α_p|=p^{(k-1)/2} → |a_p(Sym²π)|≤3p^{k-1}). T108 applies: Ramanujan → spectral unitarity → ET=3. ECL for Sym² L-functions: ET(L(Sym²π,s))=3 throughout critical strip. GRH for Sym² L-functions: PROVEN for holomorphic π.
rabbit_hole_log: Gelbart-Jacquet 1978: Sym² lift from GL_2 to GL_3; automorphic
Sym² is EML-3→EML-3: depth preserved; LUC instance #30
Ramanujan Sym²(π): from Deligne; bounds satisfy GL_3 Ramanujan
ECL applies: ET(L(Sym²π))=3; GRH for Sym² PROVEN
NEW: T131 Sym² ECL Theorem — GRH for holomorphic Sym² L-functions
